name: Marketing Civic
description: Public marketing surface for civic engagement platforms with landing and about pages. Positions the platform to municipal buyers and citizen communities.

page_briefs.home: Landing-variant hero opens with an inclusive headline about community voice and transparent local government, supporting subhead, primary CTA to browse petitions, and secondary CTA to request a service. A features grid highlights petitions, budget transparency, meeting archives, and service requests. A testimonials band shows citizen and official quotes. The closing CTA section invites visitors to join the platform for their municipality.
page_briefs.about: About page leads with a brand-variant hero containing the platform mission statement, founding story, civic-tech values, and team photo. Supporting content describes partner municipalities, press mentions, and contact pathways for officials and journalists.

shells.top-nav-footer: Top navigation with marketing links and footer with civic info
